signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, BELOW FORECASTS OF 2.4% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, marking a recent confirmation that beat lowered market expectations and stayed near the central bank's 2% target amid contained price pressures before global energy volatility.[1]  
This

Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Trump Declares 'End of Iran Conflict' as Second Round of Ceasefire Talks Looms Within Days | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Declares 'End of Iran Conflict' as Second Round of Ceasefire Talks Looms Within Days | YES | HIGH confidence**
